article.title: Stanford study says 5-minute Bitcoin prediction markets enable settlement manipulation
article.summary: Researchers found that Polymarket’s five-minute Bitcoin prediction markets create incentives to manipulate spot prices around contract settlement, proposing longer settlement windows as a potential fix.
